Portfolio Inspiration

🏡 Home

Inspiration repo

GitHub - timlrx/tailwind-nextjs-starter-blog: This is a Next.js, Tailwind CSS blogging starter template. Comes out of the box configured with the latest technologies to make technical writing a breeze. Easily configurable and customizable. Perfect as a replacement to existing Jekyll and Hugo individual blogs.
GitHub - Evavic44/victoreke.com: My personal portfolio website built with Next.js, Sanity and Tailwind CSS.
GitHub - AnishDe12020/portfolio: My portfolio site built using nextjs, contentlayer, and tailwind css
GitHub - pycoder2000/blog: 🚀 My personal blog made with Tailwind CSS and NextJS. Template from Timlrx. Feel free to fork, follow and use.
GitHub - davzoku/personal-website-v1: 👨🏻‍💻🏠 my digital home (2021 - present)
GitHub - leon0399/leon0399.ru: My 🏠 on 🌐
